title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Zomato Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Zomato Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
We at Zomato Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Software Engineer based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Zomato Holdings Services:
Zomato Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Holdings Services!
